PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $body = '{"business_name":"Sharma Sweets","city":"Delhi","category":"sweets shop","website_url":"https://example.com","monthly_ad_spend":5000}'; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8000/audit -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; Write-Output "audit_id: $\($resp.audit_id\)")

PowerShell($id = "51d99d6c-35c8-4274-b29f-4f9849ee52b9"; $status = ""; $tries = 0; while \($status -ne "done" -and $tries -lt 30\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/audit/$id" -Method GET; $status = $r.status; $tries++; Write-Output "[$tries] status=$status workers=$\($r.workers_done\)" }; if \($status -eq "done"\) { $report = $r.report; Write-Output "=== REPORT ==="; Write-Output "overall_score: $\($report.overall_score\)"; Write-Output "web_performance: score=$\($report.dimensions.web_performance.score\) label=$\($report.dimensions.web_performance.label\)"; Write-Output "summary: $\($report.dimensions.web_performance.summary\)"; Write-Output "recs: $\($report.dimensions.web_performance.recommendations -join ' | '\)"; Write-Output "quick_wins: $\($report.campaign_preview.quick_wins -join ' | '\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"business_name":"Sharma Sweets","city":"Delhi","category":"sweets shop","website_url":"https://example.com","monthly_ad_spend":5000}'; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8000/audit -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; Write-Output "audit_id: $\($resp.audit_id\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/audit/b6ac9495-2835-4a95-94d1-c37f5d799022" -Method GET; Write-Output "status: $\($r.status\)"; $rp = $r.report; Write-Output "overall: $\($rp.overall_score\)"; Write-Output "web_perf: score=$\($rp.dimensions.web_performance.score\) | $\($rp.dimensions.web_performance.label\)"; Write-Output "web_perf summary: $\($rp.dimensions.web_performance.summary\)"; Write-Output "web_perf recs: $\($rp.dimensions.web_performance.recommendations -join ' | '\)"; Write-Output "quick_wins: $\($rp.campaign_preview.quick_wins -join ' | '\)"; Write-Output "headline: $\($rp.campaign_preview.headline\)"; Write-Output "budget: $\($rp.campaign_preview.monthly_budget_inr\)"; Write-Output "keywords: $\($rp.campaign_preview.keywords -join ', '\)")

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','cd C:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\ZTGOS; .venv\\Scripts\\activate; uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000' -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit','-Command','cd C:\\Users\\HP\\Desktop\\ZTGOS; .venv\\Scripts\\activate; celery -A app.workers.celery_app worker --loglevel=info --pool=solo -Q celery' -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Output "started")

PowerShell($id = "e48150af-e91a-45c1-a0e9-6e66c95db9d3"; $tries=0; $status=""; while\($status -notin @\("completed","failed"\) -and $tries -lt 40\){ Start-Sleep 4; $r=Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/audit/$id"; $status=$r.status; $tries++; Write-Output "[$tries] $status" }; Write-Output "--- final: $status ---")

PowerShell($rp = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/audit/e48150af-e91a-45c1-a0e9-6e66c95db9d3/report"; Write-Output "=== GMB ==="; $gp = $rp.dimensions.local_seo; Write-Output "local_seo: score=$\($gp.score\) | $\($gp.label\)"; Write-Output "summary: $\($gp.summary\)"; Write-Output "competitor_hint: $\($gp.competitor_hint\)"; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== FULL REPORT \(dimensions\) ==="; $rp.dimensions | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $body = '{"business_name":"Apna Sweets","city":"Indore","category":"sweets shop","website_url":"https://apnasweets.com","monthly_ad_spend":10000}'; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri http://localhost:8000/audit -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $id = $resp.audit_id; Write-Output "audit_id: $id"; $tries=0; $status=""; while\($status -notin @\("completed","failed"\) -and $tries -lt 40\){ Start-Sleep 5; $r=Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/audit/$id"; $status=$r.status; $tries++; Write-Output "[$tries] $status" }; $rp = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:8000/audit/$id/report"; Write-Output "local_seo score: $\($rp.dimensions.local_seo.score\)"; Write-Output "local_seo summary: $\($rp.dimensions.local_seo.summary\)"; Write-Output "local_seo recs: $\($rp.dimensions.local_seo.recommendations -join ' | '\)"; Write-Output "competitor_hint: $\($rp.dimensions.local_seo.competitor_hint\)")

PowerShell($id = "a0bf48cd-2185-4c9d-b731-a8bbd0f32708"; $status = ""; $i = 0; while \($status -ne "completed" -and $status -ne "failed" -and $i -lt 30\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/audit/$id"; $status = $r.status; Write-Host "$i status=$status error=$\($r.error\)"; $i++ })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/audit/5cf92ebd-97f3-4e82-9611-54f15610ceb0/report"; $cp = $r.campaign_preview; Write-Host "=== CAMPAIGN ==="; Write-Host "channel:         $\($cp.channel\)"; Write-Host "budget:          $\($cp.monthly_budget_inr\)"; Write-Host "leads:           $\($cp.expected_leads\)"; Write-Host "cpl:             $\($cp.cost_per_lead_inr\)"; Write-Host "reach:           $\($cp.estimated_reach\)"; Write-Host "add_revenue:     $\($cp.estimated_additional_revenue\)"; Write-Host "quick_wins:      $\($cp.quick_wins\)"; Write-Host "=== SCORES ==="; Write-Host "overall:         $\($r.overall_score\)"; Write-Host "revenue_low:     $\($r.revenue_loss_low\)"; Write-Host "revenue_high:    $\($r.revenue_loss_high\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/audit/e5824d6e-7626-46c4-8fb2-ba247b828a16/report"; $cp = $r.campaign_preview; Write-Host "budget=$\($cp.monthly_budget_inr\)  leads=$\($cp.expected_leads\)  cpl=$\($cp.cost_per_lead_inr\)  reach=$\($cp.estimated_reach\)  add_rev=$\($cp.estimated_additional_revenue\)"; Write-Host "ad: $\($cp.ad_copies[0].headline\)")
